---
name: Evidence Factory follow-up
about: Promote an Evidence Docket through replay, baselines, and safety review.
title: "Evidence Factory: independent replay + baselines for <run-id>"
labels: ["evidence-docket", "replay", "baseline", "safety"]
---

## Objective

Promote this run from deterministic Evidence Docket scaffold toward independent replay and baseline-comparative evidence.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Clean fork / clean checkout replay passes
- [ ] Source snapshot archived
- [ ] Hash manifest generated
- [ ] Cost ledger present
- [ ] Safety ledger present
- [ ] B0/B1/B2/B3/B4 baselines run under equal constraints
- [ ] `baseline_results.json` generated
- [ ] `replay_report.json` generated
- [ ] `independent_review.md` completed by reviewer
- [ ] Scoreboard published
- [ ] `claim_level.json` marks result conservatively

## Claim boundary

This issue does not attempt to prove AGI, ASI, empirical SOTA, safe autonomy, or broad scalability. It tests whether one Evidence Docket can be independently replayed and compared against baselines.
